title: tanacetopsis submarginata
intro: Tanacetopsis submarginata, also known as the yellow chamomile or dwarf chamomile, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and calm digestive issues. The health benefits of Tanacetopsis submarginata include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Tanacetopsis submarginata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
